sEn: MiMo-VL-7B-RL outperforms Qwen2.5-VL-7B on 35/40 tasks and scores 59.4 on OlympiadBench, surpassing 78B models.
sZh: MiMo-VL-7B-RL 在 40 项任务中的 35 项上超越 Qwen2.5-VL-7B，并在 OlympiadBench 上获得 59.4 分，超越 78B 参数模型。
absEn: We open-source MiMo-VL-7B-SFT and MiMo-VL-7B-RL, two powerful vision-language models delivering state-of-the-art performance in both general visual understanding and multimodal reasoning. MiMo-VL-7B-RL outperforms Qwen2.5-VL-7B on 35 out of 40 evaluated tasks, and scores 59.4 on OlympiadBench, surpassing models with up to 78B parameters. For GUI grounding applications, it sets a new standard with 56.1 on OSWorld-G, even outperforming specialized models such as UI-TARS. Our training combines four-stage pre-training (2.4 trillion tokens) with Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning (MORL) integrating diverse reward signals. We identify the importance of incorporating high-quality reasoning data with long Chain-of-Thought into pre-training stages, and the benefits of mixed RL despite challenges in simultaneous multi-domain optimization. We also contribute a comprehensive evaluation suite covering 50+ tasks to promote reproducibility and advance the field. The model checkpoints and full evaluation suite are available at https://github.com/XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-VL.
absZh: 我们开源了 MiMo-VL-7B-SFT 和 MiMo-VL-7B-RL 两个强大的视觉语言模型，在通用视觉理解和多模态推理方面均达到最先进水平。MiMo-VL-7B-RL 在 40 项评估任务中的 35 项上优于 Qwen2.5-VL-7B，并在 OlympiadBench 上获得 59.4 分，超越了参数高达 78B 的模型。在 GUI 接地应用中，它以 56.1 分在 OSWorld-G 上树立了新标准，甚至优于 UI-TARS 等专用模型。我们的训练结合了四阶段预训练（2.4 万亿 token）和混合在线强化学习（MORL），集成了多样化的奖励信号。我们发现了将高质量推理数据与长思维链纳入预训练阶段的重要性，以及尽管多领域同步优化存在挑战，混合 RL 仍能带来益处。我们还贡献了一套涵盖 50 多项任务的综合评估套件，以促进可重复性和推动领域发展。模型检查点和完整评估套件可在 https://github.com/XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-VL 获取。

contrib.en: Open-sources MiMo-VL-7B-SFT and MiMo-VL-7B-RL, achieving state-of-the-art performance on 35/40 tasks vs Qwen2.5-VL-7B.
contrib.zh: 开源 MiMo-VL-7B-SFT 和 MiMo-VL-7B-RL，在 35/40 项任务上超越 Qwen2.5-VL-7B，达到领先水平。

contrib.en: Proposes Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning (MORL) integrating diverse reward signals for stable multi-domain optimization.
contrib.zh: 提出混合在线强化学习（MORL），整合多种奖励信号，实现多领域稳定优化。

contrib.en: Identifies importance of incorporating long Chain-of-Thought reasoning data into pre-training stages for enhanced performance.
contrib.zh: 发现将长思维链推理数据纳入预训练阶段对提升性能至关重要。

contrib.en: Achieves 59.4 on OlympiadBench, surpassing models with up to 78B parameters, and 56.1 on OSWorld-G for GUI grounding.
contrib.zh: 在 OlympiadBench 上取得 59.4 分，超越高达 78B 参数的模型；在 OSWorld-G 上取得 56.1 分，刷新 GUI 接地标准。

contrib.en: Contributes a comprehensive evaluation suite covering 50+ tasks with prompts and protocols for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 贡献包含 50+ 任务的综合评估套件，提供提示词和协议以促进可复现性。

contrib.en: Demonstrates highest Elo rating among open-source VLMs in user preference evaluation, competitive with proprietary models.
contrib.zh: 在用户偏好评估中，Elo 评分在开源 VLM 中最高，与闭源模型竞争。

limits.en: MORL faces task interference due to opposing response length trends between reasoning and grounding tasks.
limits.zh: MORL 面临任务干扰，推理与接地任务响应长度趋势相反。

limits.en: Vanilla GRPO saturates around 20k samples, while on-policy RL shows no saturation within observed training window.
limits.zh: 标准 GRPO 在约 2 万样本时饱和，而在线 RL 在观察窗口内未饱和。

limits.en: Simultaneous multi-domain optimization remains challenging; standalone RL on individual tasks may outperform MORL.
limits.zh: 多领域同步优化仍具挑战；单任务独立 RL 可能优于 MORL。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 7B parameter scale; scaling to larger models may reveal different behaviors.
limits.zh: 评估限于 7B 参数规模；扩展到更大模型可能呈现不同行为。

limits.en: Synthetic reasoning data quality depends on large reasoning models; rejection sampling may not eliminate all errors.
limits.zh: 合成推理数据质量依赖大型推理模型；拒绝采样可能无法消除所有错误。

items.en: We open-source MiMo-VL-7B-SFT and MiMo-VL-7B-RL, two powerful vision-language models delivering state-of-the-art performance in both general visual understanding and multimodal reasoning. MiMo-VL-7B-RL outperforms Qwen2.5-VL-7B on 35 out of 40 evaluated tasks, and scores 59.4 on OlympiadBench, surpassing models with up to 78B parameters. For GUI grounding applications, it sets a new standard with 56.1 on OSWorld-G, even outperforming specialized models such as UI-TARS. Our training combines four-stage pre-training (2.4 trillion tokens) with Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning (MORL) integrating diverse reward signals. We identify the importance of incorporating high-quality reasoning data with long Chain-of-Thought into pre-training stages, and the benefits of mixed RL despite challenges in simultaneous multi-domain optimization. We also contribute a comprehensive evaluation suite covering 50+ tasks to promote reproducibility and advance the field. The model checkpoints and full evaluation suite are available at https://github.com/XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-VL.
items.zh: 我们开源了 MiMo-VL-7B-SFT 和 MiMo-VL-7B-RL，这是两个强大的视觉语言模型，在通用视觉理解和多模态推理方面均达到了最先进的性能。MiMo-VL-7B-RL 在 40 个评估任务中的 35 个上优于 Qwen2.5-VL-7B，并在 OlympiadBench 上获得 59.4 分，超越了参数高达 78B 的模型。对于 GUI 接地应用，它在 OSWorld-G 上以 56.1 分树立了新标准，甚至超越了 UI-TARS 等专用模型。我们的训练结合了四阶段预训练（2.4 万亿 token）和混合同策略强化学习（MORL），集成了多样化的奖励信号。我们发现了将高质量推理数据与长思维链纳入预训练阶段的重要性，以及混合 RL 在同时多领域优化挑战下的益处。我们还贡献了一个涵盖 50 多个任务的综合评估套件，以促进可重复性并推动该领域发展。模型检查点和完整评估套件可在 https://github.com/XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-VL 获取。

items.en: Vision-language models (VLMs) have emerged as the foundational backbone for multimodal AI systems, enabling autonomous agents to perceive the visual world, reason over multimodal content (Yue et al., 2024b), and interact with both digital (Xie et al., 2024; OpenAI, 2025) and physical environments (Zitkovich et al., 2023; Black et al., 2024). The significance of these capabilities has motivated extensive exploration across multiple dimensions, including novel architectural designs (Alayrac et al., 2022; Team, 2024; Ye et al., 2025) and innovative training methodologies with optimized data recipes (Karamcheti et al., 2024; Dai et al., 2024), leading to rapid progress in the field (Liu et al., 2023; Tong et al., 2024; Bai et al., 2025a).
items.zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）已成为多模态 AI 系统的基础骨干，使自主智能体能够感知视觉世界、推理多模态内容（Yue et al., 2024b），并与数字（Xie et al., 2024; OpenAI, 2025）和物理环境（Zitkovich et al., 2023; Black et al., 2024）进行交互。这些能力的重要性推动了多个维度的广泛探索，包括新颖的架构设计（Alayrac et al., 2022; Team, 2024; Ye et al., 2025）和具有优化数据配方的创新训练方法（Karamcheti et al., 2024; Dai et al., 2024），从而推动了该领域的快速发展（Liu et al., 2023; Tong et al., 2024; Bai et al., 2025a）。

items.en: In this report, we share our efforts to build a compact yet powerful VLM, MiMo-VL-7B. MiMo-VL-7B comprises three components: (1) a native-resolution Vision Transformer (ViT) encoder that preserves fine-grained visual details, (2) a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) projector for efficient cross-modal alignment, and (3) our MiMo-7B (Xiaomi, 2025) language model, specifically optimized for complex reasoning tasks.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们分享了构建紧凑而强大的 VLM——MiMo-VL-7B 的努力。MiMo-VL-7B 包含三个组件：（1）一个原生分辨率视觉 Transformer（ViT）编码器，保留细粒度视觉细节；（2）一个多层感知器（MLP）投影器，用于高效的跨模态对齐；（3）我们的 MiMo-7B（Xiaomi, 2025）语言模型，专门针对复杂推理任务进行了优化。

items.en: The development of MiMo-VL-7B involves two sequential training processes: (1) A four-stage pre-training phase, which includes projector warmup, vision-language alignment, general multimodal pre-training, and long-context Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Throughout these stages, we curate high-quality datasets by strategically combining open-source collections with synthetic data generation techniques, consuming 2.4 trillion tokens, adjusting the dataset distribution in different stages to facilitate training. This phase yields the MiMo-VL-7B-SFT model. (2) A subsequent post-training phase, where we introduce Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning (MORL), a novel framework that seamlessly integrates diverse reward signals spanning perception accuracy, visual grounding precision, logical reasoning capabilities, and human preferences. We adopt the idea of GRPO (Shao et al., 2024) and enhance training stability by exclusively performing on-policy gradient updates during this stage. This phase yields the MiMo-VL-7B-RL model.
items.zh: MiMo-VL-7B 的开发涉及两个顺序训练过程：（1）四阶段预训练阶段，包括投影器预热、视觉语言对齐、通用多模态预训练和长上下文监督微调（SFT）。在这些阶段中，我们通过策略性地结合开源数据集与合成数据生成技术来策划高质量数据集，消耗了 2.4 万亿 token，在不同阶段调整数据集分布以促进训练。该阶段产生了 MiMo-VL-7B-SFT 模型。（2）后续的后训练阶段，我们引入了混合同策略强化学习（MORL），这是一种新颖的框架，无缝集成了涵盖感知准确性、视觉接地精度、逻辑推理能力和人类偏好的多样化奖励信号。我们采用了 GRPO（Shao et al., 2024）的思想，并通过在此阶段仅执行同策略梯度更新来增强训练稳定性。该阶段产生了 MiMo-VL-7B-RL 模型。

items.en: (1) Incorporating high-quality, broad-coverage reasoning data from the pre-training stage is crucial for enhancing model performance. In the current era of “thinking” models, vast quantities of multimodal pre-training data are undergoing a significant re-evaluation. Traditional question-answering (QA) data, with its direct, short answers, often restricts models to superficial pattern matching and leads to overfitting. In contrast, synthesized reasoning data with long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) enables learning of complex logical relationships and generalizable reasoning patterns, providing richer supervision signals that markedly improve both performance and training efficiency. To leverage this advantage, we curate high-quality reasoning data by identifying diverse queries, employing large reasoning models to regenerate responses with long CoT, and applying rejection sampling to ensure quality. Furthermore, rather than treating this as supplementary fine-tuning data, we incorporate substantial volumes of this synthetic reasoning data directly into the later pre-training stages, where extended training yields continued performance improvements without saturation.
items.zh: （1）从预训练阶段纳入高质量、覆盖广泛的推理数据对于提升模型性能至关重要。在当前“思考”模型的时代，大量多模态预训练数据正在经历重大重新评估。传统的问答（QA）数据具有直接、简短的答案，通常将模型限制在浅层模式匹配并导致过拟合。相比之下，具有长思维链（CoT）的合成推理数据能够学习复杂的逻辑关系和可泛化的推理模式，提供更丰富的监督信号，显著提高性能和训练效率。为了利用这一优势，我们通过识别多样化的查询、使用大型推理模型重新生成带有长 CoT 的响应，并应用拒绝采样来确保质量，从而策划高质量推理数据。此外，我们并未将其视为补充微调数据，而是将大量此类合成推理数据直接纳入后期预训练阶段，其中扩展训练带来了持续的性能提升而不会饱和。

items.en: (2) Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning further enhances model performance, while achieving stable simultaneous improvements remains challenging. We apply RL across diverse capabilities, including reasoning, perception, grounding, and human preference alignment, spanning modalities including text, images, and videos. While this hybrid training approach further unlocks the model’s potential, interference across data domains remains challenging. Disparities in the growth trends of response length and task difficulty levels hinder stable, simultaneous improvements across all capabilities.
items.zh: （2）混合同策略强化学习进一步提升了模型性能，但实现稳定的同时改进仍然具有挑战性。我们将 RL 应用于多种能力，包括推理、感知、接地和人类偏好对齐，涵盖文本、图像和视频等模态。虽然这种混合训练方法进一步释放了模型潜力，但数据域之间的干扰仍然具有挑战性。响应长度增长趋势和任务难度水平的差异阻碍了所有能力的稳定、同步提升。

items.en: MiMo-VL-7B-RL delivers exceptional results across the full spectrum of multimodal capabilities. (1) On fundamental visual perception tasks, it achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source VLMs of comparable scale, scoring 66.7 on MMMU (Yue et al., 2024b) and outperforming Qwen2.5-VL-7B (Bai et al., 2025a) on 35 out of 40 evaluated tasks. (2) For complex multimodal reasoning, MiMo-VL-7B-RL exhibits outstanding performance, scoring 59.4 on OlympiadBench (He et al., 2024) and surpassing models up to 72B parameters. (3) In GUI grounding for agentic applications, our model sets a new standard by achieving a score of 54.7 on OSWorld-G (Xie et al., 2025), even exceeding specialized models like UI-TARS (Qin et al., 2025b). (4) In terms of user experience and preference, MiMo-VL-7B-RL achieves the highest Elo rating among all open-source VLMs on our in-house user preference evaluation, performing competitively with proprietary models such as Claude 3.7 Sonnet.
items.zh: MiMo-VL-7B-RL 在多模态能力的全谱上取得了卓越的结果。（1）在基础视觉感知任务上，它在同等规模的开源 VLM 中达到了最先进的性能，在 MMMU（Yue et al., 2024b）上获得 66.7 分，并在 40 个评估任务中的 35 个上优于 Qwen2.5-VL-7B（Bai et al., 2025a）。（2）对于复杂多模态推理，MiMo-VL-7B-RL 表现出色，在 OlympiadBench（He et al., 2024）上获得 59.4 分，超越了参数高达 72B 的模型。（3）在智能体式应用的 GUI 接地方面，我们的模型在 OSWorld-G（Xie et al., 2025）上获得 54.7 分，树立了新标准，甚至超过了 UI-TARS（Qin et al., 2025b）等专用模型。（4）在用户体验和偏好方面，MiMo-VL-7B-RL 在我们内部用户偏好评估中获得了所有开源 VLM 中最高的 Elo 评分，与 Claude 3.7 Sonnet 等专有模型竞争激烈。

items.en: These results validate our approach: by combining strong perception, sophisticated reasoning, and precise grounding capabilities through our MORL framework, MiMo-VL-7B-SFT and MiMo-VL-7B-RL establish new standards for open-source vision-language models. To promote transparency and reproducibility, we also contribute a comprehensive evaluation suite covering 50+ tasks with complete prompts and protocols, enabling the community to build upon our work.
items.zh: 这些结果验证了我们的方法：通过我们的 MORL 框架结合强大的感知、复杂的推理和精确的接地能力，MiMo-VL-7B-SFT 和 MiMo-VL-7B-RL 为开源视觉语言模型树立了新标准。为了促进透明度和可重复性，我们还贡献了一个涵盖 50 多个任务的综合评估套件，包含完整的提示和协议，使社区能够基于我们的工作继续发展。

items.en: In this section, we introduce the architecture design of our MiMo-VL-7B, followed by the data curation process and training recipes of pre-training stages.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍 MiMo-VL-7B 的架构设计，随后介绍预训练阶段的数据策划过程和训练方案。

items.en: MiMo-VL-7B consists of three components: (1) a Vision Transformer (ViT) for encoding visual inputs such as images and videos; (2) a projector that maps the visual encodings into a latent space aligned with the Large Language Model (LLM); and (3) the LLM itself, which performs textual understanding and reasoning. To support native resolution inputs, we adopt Qwen2.5-ViT (Bai et al., 2025a) as our visual encoder. We initialize the LLM backbone with MiMo-7B-Base (Xiaomi, 2025) to leverage its strong reasoning capability, and utilize a randomly initialized Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) as the projector. The overall architecture is illustrated in Figure 2, and the model configuration can be found in Appendix B.
items.zh: MiMo-VL-7B 包含三个组件：（1）一个视觉 Transformer（ViT），用于编码图像和视频等视觉输入；（2）一个投影器，将视觉编码映射到与大语言模型（LLM）对齐的潜在空间；（3）LLM 本身，执行文本理解和推理。为了支持原生分辨率输入，我们采用 Qwen2.5-ViT（Bai et al., 2025a）作为视觉编码器。我们使用 MiMo-7B-Base（Xiaomi, 2025）初始化 LLM 骨干，以利用其强大的推理能力，并使用随机初始化的多层感知器（MLP）作为投影器。整体架构如图 2 所示，模型配置见附录 B。

items.en: The MiMo-VL-7B pre-training dataset comprises 2.4 trillion tokens of high-quality, diverse multimodal data spanning images, videos, and text. This comprehensive dataset includes general image captions, interleaved data, Optical Character Recognition (OCR) data, grounding data, video content, GUI interactions, reasoning examples, and text-only sequences.
items.zh: MiMo-VL-7B 预训练数据集包含 2.4 万亿 token 的高质量、多样化多模态数据，涵盖图像、视频和文本。这个综合数据集包括通用图像标题、交错数据、光学字符识别（OCR）数据、接地数据、视频内容、GUI 交互、推理示例和纯文本序列。

items.en: To ensure the quality of each data modality, we implement dedicated data curation pipelines tailored to the characteristics of each data type. Throughout the training process, we systematically adjust the proportions of different data modalities across various training stages to optimize both training efficiency and model stability. Additionally, we employ phash-based image deduplication to eliminate potential overlaps between our training datasets and evaluation benchmarks, thereby minimizing data contamination.
items.zh: 为了确保每种数据模态的质量，我们实施了针对每种数据类型特征量身定制的专用数据策划流程。在整个训练过程中，我们系统地调整不同训练阶段中不同数据模态的比例，以优化训练效率和模型稳定性。此外，我们采用基于 phash 的图像去重来消除训练数据集与评估基准之间的潜在重叠，从而最小化数据污染。

items.en: We detail the specific processing procedures for each data type in the following sections.
items.zh: 我们在以下部分详细说明每种数据类型的特定处理流程。

items.en: The construction of our image caption dataset involves a multi-stage process designed to ensure high quality and distributional balance. We begin by aggregating a substantial volume of publicly available caption data from web sources. This initial corpus then undergoes a rigorous deduplication phase, employing image perceptual hashing (phash) in conjunction with text filtering, to yield a refined set of unique raw captions.
items.zh: 我们的图像标题数据集的构建涉及一个多阶段过程，旨在确保高质量和分布平衡。我们首先从网络来源聚合大量公开可用的标题数据。然后，这个初始语料库经过严格的去重阶段，采用图像感知哈希（phash）结合文本过滤，得到一组精炼的唯一原始标题。

items.en: Subsequently, leveraging both the images and their original textual descriptions as priors, we utilize a specialized captioning model to re-caption the entire raw caption dataset. Following re-captioning, we apply filtering mechanisms to the generated captions based on linguistic consistency and repetition patterns to ensure the quality of the re-captioned text. To address inherent data imbalances, we adopt the methodology of MetaCLIP (Xu et al., 2023), which involves constructing novel bilingual (Chinese and English) metadata. This critical step serves to refine the caption distribution, thereby mitigating the over-representation of high-frequency entries and reducing dataset noise.
items.zh: 随后，利用图像及其原始文本描述作为先验，我们使用专门的标题模型对整个原始标题数据集进行重新标题化。重新标题化后，我们根据语言一致性和重复模式对生成的标题应用过滤机制，以确保重新标题文本的质量。为了解决固有的数据不平衡问题，我们采用 MetaCLIP（Xu et al., 2023）的方法，构建新颖的双语（中文和英文）元数据。这一关键步骤有助于细化标题分布，从而减轻高频条目的过度表示并减少数据集噪声。

items.en: The culmination of this meticulous process is a balanced, high-quality, and diverse caption dataset. Crucially, we observe that this rich dataset significantly enhances model generalization and qualitative performance, offering advantages not always fully reflected in evaluations on existing, specialized benchmarks.
items.zh: 这一细致过程的结果是一个平衡、高质量且多样化的标题数据集。至关重要的是，我们观察到这个丰富的数据集显著增强了模型的泛化能力和定性性能，提供了在现有专门基准评估中不一定完全反映的优势。

items.en: We compile an extensive corpus of interleaved image-text data from diverse sources, including webpages, books, and academic papers. For content originating from books and papers, we employ advanced PDF parsing toolkits for content extraction and cleansing. The filtering process prioritizes and retains data types rich in world knowledge, such as textbooks, encyclopedias, manuals, guides, patents, and biographies. Within this interleaved dataset, textual segments are evaluated based on metrics including knowledge density and readability. For the visual components, we implement filters to exclude images of diminutive size, anomalous aspect ratios, unsafe content, and those with minimal visual information (e.g., decorative chapter headings and illustrations). Finally, image-text pairs are scored on relevance, complementarity, and the balance of information density, ensuring the retention of high-quality data. This curated dataset significantly augments the model’s knowledge repository, thereby establishing a robust foundation for its subsequent reasoning capabilities.
items.zh: 我们从不同来源编译了一个广泛的交错图像-文本数据语料库，包括网页、书籍和学术论文。对于来自书籍和论文的内容，我们使用先进的 PDF 解析工具包进行内容提取和清洗。过滤过程优先保留富含世界知识的数据类型，如教科书、百科全书、手册、指南、专利和传记。在这个交错数据集中，文本片段根据知识密度和可读性等指标进行评估。对于视觉组件，我们实施过滤器以排除尺寸过小、宽高比异常、不安全内容以及视觉信息极少的图像（例如装饰性章节标题和插图）。最后，图像-文本对根据相关性、互补性和信息密度平衡进行评分，确保保留高质量数据。这个策划的数据集显著增强了模型的知识库，从而为其后续推理能力奠定了坚实基础。

items.en: To enhance the model’s capabilities in OCR and object grounding, we compile an extensive corpus of OCR and grounding data from open-source datasets for pre-training.
items.zh: 为了增强模型在 OCR 和对象接地方面的能力，我们从开源数据集编译了一个广泛的 OCR 和接地数据语料库用于预训练。

items.en: For the OCR data, the images encompass a diverse textual content from documents, tables, general scenes, product packaging, and mathematical formulas. To increase learning difficulty, in addition to standard printed text, we specifically incorporate images containing handwritten script, typographically deformed text, and blurry/occluded text, thereby improving the model’s recognition performance and robustness. For a portion of this data, textual regions are annotated with bounding boxes, enabling the model to simultaneously predict these locations.
items.zh: 对于OCR数据，图像涵盖了来自文档、表格、一般场景、产品包装和数学公式的多样化文本内容。为了增加学习难度，除了标准印刷文本外，我们特别加入了包含手写文字、字体变形文本以及模糊/遮挡文本的图像，从而提升模型的识别性能和鲁棒性。对于这部分数据的一部分，文本区域用边界框进行了标注，使模型能够同时预测这些位置。

items.en: For the grounding data, our images feature scenarios with both single and multiple objects. We further improve the model’s capacity to comprehend complex referential intentions by employing intricate object expressions within localization prompts. In all scenarios involving localization, we use absolute coordinates for representation.
items.zh: 对于定位数据，我们的图像包含单目标和多目标场景。我们通过在定位提示中使用复杂的目标描述，进一步提升模型理解复杂指代意图的能力。在所有涉及定位的场景中，我们使用绝对坐标进行表示。

items.en: Our video dataset primarily draws from publicly available online videos, spanning a wide array of domains, genres, and durations. Based on the videos, we design a video re-captioning pipeline that produces dense, fine-grained event-level descriptions. Each caption is temporally grounded with precise start and end timestamps, enabling the model to develop general video perception with time-awareness. From the caption dataset, we further collect a subset with a balanced distribution of event durations for temporal grounding pretraining. We also curate video analysis data that summarize the global semantics of videos, such as narrative structures, stylistic elements, and implicit intentions. These analytical paragraphs enable the model to grasp in-depth comprehension of videos and extended world knowledge. To enhance the model’s conversational coherence, we collect diverse and challenging questions about videos and synthesize corresponding responses. We also incorporate open-source video captioning and conversation datasets to further enrich our video pretraining data.
items.zh: 我们的视频数据集主要来自公开的在线视频，涵盖广泛的领域、类型和时长。基于这些视频，我们设计了一个视频重新描述流程，生成密集、细粒度的事件级描述。每个描述都带有精确的开始和结束时间戳，使模型能够发展具有时间感知的通用视频感知能力。从描述数据集中，我们进一步收集了一个事件时长分布均衡的子集，用于时间定位预训练。我们还整理了视频分析数据，总结视频的全局语义，如叙事结构、风格元素和隐含意图。这些分析段落使模型能够深入理解视频并扩展世界知识。为了增强模型的对话连贯性，我们收集了关于视频的多样且具有挑战性的问题，并合成了相应的回答。我们还整合了开源视频描述和对话数据集，以进一步丰富我们的视频预训练数据。

items.en: To enhance the model’s capabilities in navigating Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs), we collect open-source pre-training data covering all sorts of platforms such as mobile, web, and desktop. A synthetic data engine is also devised to compensate for the limitations of open-source data and to strengthen specific aspects of the model’s capabilities. For example, we have constructed a vast amount of Chinese GUI data to enable the model to better handle Chinese GUI scenarios.
items.zh: 为了增强模型在图形用户界面（GUI）中的导航能力，我们收集了涵盖移动、网页和桌面等各种平台的开源预训练数据。我们还设计了一个合成数据引擎，以弥补开源数据的局限性并增强模型特定方面的能力。例如，我们构建了大量中文GUI数据，使模型能够更好地处理中文GUI场景。

items.en: For GUI Grounding, we gather data for both element grounding and instruction grounding. Element grounding trains the model to precisely locate interface elements based on textual descriptions, establishing a robust perception of static user interfaces. Instruction grounding requires the model to identify target objects on screenshots according to user instructions, enhancing comprehension of GUI interaction logic. For this part, we additionally introduce a pre-training task that involves predicting intermediate actions based on before-and-after screenshots. Empirical evidence demonstrates that this approach significantly improves the model’s dynamic perception of GUI interfaces.
items.zh: 对于GUI定位，我们收集了元素定位和指令定位的数据。元素定位训练模型根据文本描述精确定位界面元素，建立对静态用户界面的稳健感知。指令定位要求模型根据用户指令在截图上识别目标对象，增强对GUI交互逻辑的理解。为此，我们额外引入了一个预训练任务，即根据前后截图预测中间动作。实验证据表明，这种方法显著提升了模型对GUI界面的动态感知能力。

items.en: For GUI Action, we collect a large scale of long GUI action trajectories. To ensure consistency across different platforms, we unified actions from mobile, web, and desktop environments into a standardized action space. A detailed specification of this action space is provided in Appendix D. This harmonization prevents action conflicts while maintaining platform-specific functionality.
items.zh: 对于GUI动作，我们收集了大规模的长时间GUI动作轨迹。为了确保不同平台之间的一致性，我们将移动、网页和桌面环境中的动作统一到一个标准化的动作空间中。附录D提供了该动作空间的详细规范。这种统一在保持平台特定功能的同时，防止了动作冲突。

items.en: Our approach to generating synthetic reasoning data begins with the comprehensive curation of open-source questions. This diverse collection spans perceptual question answering, document question answering, video question answering, and visual reasoning tasks, supplemented by question-answer pairs derived from web content and literary works.
items.zh: 我们生成合成推理数据的方法始于对开源问题的全面整理。这个多样化的集合涵盖了感知问答、文档问答、视频问答和视觉推理任务，并补充了来自网络内容和文学作品的问答对。

items.en: Following initial filtering of these source questions, we leverage a large reasoning model to produce answers that integrate explicit reasoning. A cornerstone of our methodology is rigorous, multi-stage quality control. Beyond verifying the factual correctness of answers, we apply strict filtering criteria to the reasoning processes themselves, evaluating clarity of thought, eliminating redundancy, and ensuring consistent formatting.
items.zh: 在对这些源问题进行初步筛选后，我们利用一个大型推理模型生成包含显式推理的答案。我们方法的一个基石是严格的多阶段质量控制。除了验证答案的事实正确性外，我们还对推理过程本身应用严格的过滤标准，评估思路清晰度，消除冗余，并确保格式一致。

items.en: The resulting high-fidelity dataset plays a critical role in empowering our model. It facilitates the effective inheritance of strong reasoning abilities inherent in MiMo-7B-Base (Xiaomi, 2025), enabling their seamless transfer and adaptation to multimodal contexts. Consequently, this allows our model to exhibit powerful and versatile multimodal reasoning capabilities across a broad array of domains.
items.zh: 由此产生的高保真数据集在赋能我们的模型方面发挥了关键作用。它有助于有效继承MiMo-7B-Base（小米，2025）固有的强大推理能力，使其能够无缝迁移并适应多模态场景。因此，这使得我们的模型能够在广泛的领域展现出强大且通用的多模态推理能力。

items.en: Our model undergoes a four pre-training stages as illustrated in Table 1:
items.zh: 我们的模型经历了四个预训练阶段，如表1所示：

items.en: Stage 1: We freeze the ViT and LLM components, and warm up the randomly initialized projector using image-caption pairs. This ensures the projector learns to map visual concepts to the language model’s representation space effectively, providing informative gradient signals for subsequent training stages rather than noisy updates from a poorly aligned projector.
items.zh: 阶段1：我们冻结ViT和LLM组件，并使用图像-文本对预热随机初始化的投影器。这确保投影器有效地学习将视觉概念映射到语言模型的表示空间，为后续训练阶段提供信息丰富的梯度信号，而不是来自对齐不良投影器的噪声更新。

items.en: Stage 2: The ViT is then unfrozen, and interleaved data is introduced to further strengthen vision-language alignment. The inclusion of complex and diverse images within the interleaved data enhances the ViT’s performance and robustness.
items.zh: 阶段2：然后解冻ViT，并引入交错数据以进一步加强视觉-语言对齐。交错数据中包含复杂多样的图像，提升了ViT的性能和鲁棒性。

items.en: Stage 3: In this stage, all parameters are trainable. We introduce a more diverse array of data and tasks, including OCR, grounding, video, and GUI data—accumulating to 1.4 trillion tokens—to bolster the model’s general multimodal capabilities. To ensure stable mid-stage evaluation monitoring, small quantities of QA, instruction-following, and reasoning data are incorporated. Furthermore, a limited amount of text-only data is utilized to preserve MiMo-7B-Base’s textual capability.
items.zh: 阶段3：在此阶段，所有参数均可训练。我们引入了更多样化的数据和任务，包括OCR、定位、视频和GUI数据——累计达到1.4万亿个token——以增强模型的通用多模态能力。为了确保稳定的中期评估监控，加入了少量QA、指令遵循和推理数据。此外，使用有限数量的纯文本数据以保持MiMo-7B-Base的文本能力。

items.en: Stage 4: This stage is dedicated to enhancing the model’s adaptability to long-context inputs. The training sequence length is extended from 8K to 32K tokens. We introduce additional data types such as long pure text, high-resolution images, long documents, extended videos, and long reasoning data to augment its long-context processing capabilities. As long-context packing significantly increases the effective batch size, the learning rate is adjusted from 1e-5 to 2.5e-5. Relative to Stage 3, this stage features a markedly increased proportion of reasoning data, alongside the introduction of long-form reasoning patterns.
items.zh: 阶段4：此阶段致力于增强模型对长上下文输入的适应性。训练序列长度从8K token扩展到32K token。我们引入了额外的数据类型，如长纯文本、高分辨率图像、长文档、长视频和长推理数据，以增强其长上下文处理能力。由于长上下文打包显著增加了有效批量大小，学习率从1e-5调整为2.5e-5。与阶段3相比，此阶段推理数据的比例显著增加，同时引入了长形式推理模式。

items.en: These four stages create a powerful model, MiMo-VL-7B-SFT. With particular emphasis on Stage 4, the model’s reasoning capabilities are fully realized, enabling it to address highly intricate STEM problems. This advanced reasoning aptitude also generalizes effectively to common perception tasks. Consequently, our model demonstrates exceptionally high performance across various downstream benchmarks.
items.zh: 这四个阶段创建了一个强大的模型MiMo-VL-7B-SFT。特别强调阶段4，模型的推理能力得到充分实现，使其能够解决高度复杂的STEM问题。这种高级推理能力也能有效泛化到常见的感知任务。因此，我们的模型在各种下游基准测试中表现出极高的性能。

items.en: Building upon the visual perception capabilities and multimodal reasoning established during pre-training, we conduct post-training to further enhance MiMo-VL-7B. Our approach employs a novel Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning (MORL) framework that seamlessly integrates Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) (Shao et al., 2024; Lambert et al., 2025) with Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) (Ouyang et al., 2022) to improve MiMo-VL-7B on challenging reasoning tasks and alignment with human preferences.
items.zh: 在预训练期间建立的视觉感知能力和多模态推理基础上，我们进行后训练以进一步增强MiMo-VL-7B。我们的方法采用了一种新颖的混合在线策略强化学习（MORL）框架，该框架将基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）（Shao等人，2024；Lambert等人，2025）与基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）（Ouyang等人，2022）无缝集成，以在具有挑战性的推理任务和与人类偏好对齐方面改进MiMo-VL-7B。

full.secZh: 3.1 基于可验证奖励的强化学习

items.en: RLVR relies exclusively on rule-based reward functions, enabling continuous model self-improvement. In the post-training of MiMo-VL-7B, we design multiple verifiable reasoning and perception tasks where final solutions can be precisely validated using predefined rules.
items.zh: RLVR完全依赖基于规则的奖励函数，使模型能够持续自我改进。在MiMo-VL-7B的后训练中，我们设计了多个可验证的推理和感知任务，其中最终解决方案可以使用预定义规则精确验证。

items.en: Visual reasoning capabilities are fundamental for multimodal models to understand and solve complex problems that require both visual perception and logical thinking. To facilitate this capability, we compile diverse verifiable STEM questions from open-source communities and proprietary K-12 collections. An LLM is prompted to filter proof-based problems and rewrite multiple-choice questions with numerical or symbolic answers into free-answer formats, alleviating potential reward hacking. We further refine question quality through comprehensive model-based difficulty assessment, excluding questions that either cannot be solved by advanced VLMs or are too easy, with a MiMo-VL-7B rollout pass rate exceeding 90%. Additionally, we remove questions solvable even without image inputs. After data cleaning and category balancing, we curate a visual reasoning dataset of 80K problems. For evaluation, we use the rule-based Math-Verify library to determine response correctness.111https://github.com/huggingface/Math-Verify
items.zh: 视觉推理能力对于多模态模型理解和解决需要视觉感知和逻辑思维的复杂问题至关重要。为了促进这种能力，我们从开源社区和专有的K-12数据集中收集了多样化的可验证STEM问题。提示一个LLM过滤基于证明的问题，并将具有数值或符号答案的多选题改写为自由回答格式，以减轻潜在的奖励破解。我们通过全面的基于模型的难度评估进一步优化问题质量，排除那些既不能被高级VLM解决又太容易的问题，其中MiMo-VL-7B的通过率超过90%。此外，我们移除了即使没有图像输入也能解决的问题。经过数据清洗和类别平衡后，我们整理了一个包含8万个问题的视觉推理数据集。对于评估，我们使用基于规则的Math-Verify库来确定回答的正确性。

items.en: Since most visual reasoning data is limited to K-12 level questions, the reasoning performance of RL-trained models could be constrained. In contrast, text-only reasoning datasets include more challenging queries requiring college or competition-level intelligence. To unleash the full reasoning potential of our model, we incorporate mathematical reasoning data from Xiaomi (2025). Rewards are computed using the same rule-based Math-Verify library to ensure consistent evaluation across both visual and textual reasoning tasks.
items.zh: 由于大多数视觉推理数据仅限于K-12级别的问题，经过RL训练的模型的推理性能可能受到限制。相比之下，纯文本推理数据集包含需要大学或竞赛级别智力的更具挑战性的查询。为了释放我们模型的全部推理潜力，我们纳入了来自小米（2025）的数学推理数据。使用相同的基于规则的Math-Verify库计算奖励，以确保视觉和文本推理任务的评估一致。

items.en: Accurate spatial localization is essential for models to understand object relationships and spatial reasoning in images. We include both general and GUI grounding tasks in our RLVR framework to enhance MiMo-VL-7B’s grounding capability. For bounding box predictions, rewards are calculated using the Generalized Intersection over Union (GIoU) (Rezatofighi et al., 2019) between predicted and ground-truth boxes. For point-style outputs, rewards are determined by whether the predicted point falls within the ground-truth bounding box.
items.zh: 准确的空间定位对于模型理解图像中的物体关系和空间推理至关重要。我们在RLVR框架中包含了通用和GUI定位任务，以增强MiMo-VL-7B的定位能力。对于边界框预测，奖励使用预测框与真实框之间的广义交并比（GIoU）（Rezatofighi等人，2019）计算。对于点式输出，奖励根据预测点是否落在真实边界框内来确定。

items.en: Precise counting abilities are essential for quantitative visual understanding and mathematical reasoning in visual contexts (Chen et al., 2025a). We enhance visual counting capabilities through RL training, where rewards are defined by the accuracy of the model’s counting predictions compared to ground-truth counts.
items.zh: 精确计数能力对于视觉环境中的定量视觉理解和数学推理至关重要（Chen et al., 2025a）。我们通过强化学习训练增强视觉计数能力，其中奖励根据模型计数预测与真实计数的准确性来定义。

items.en: Beyond static image understanding and reasoning, we extend our RLVR framework to dynamic video content to capture temporal dependencies. We incorporate temporal video grounding tasks that require the model to localize video segments corresponding to natural language queries (Wang et al., 2025). The model outputs timestamps in [mm:ss,mm:ss] format to indicate the start and end times of the target video segments. Rewards are computed as the Intersection over Union (IoU) between predicted and ground-truth temporal segments.
items.zh: 除了静态图像理解和推理，我们将RLVR框架扩展到动态视频内容以捕捉时间依赖性。我们引入了时间视频定位任务，要求模型定位与自然语言查询对应的视频片段（Wang et al., 2025）。模型以[mm:ss,mm:ss]格式输出时间戳，指示目标视频片段的开始和结束时间。奖励计算为预测时间片段与真实时间片段之间的交并比（IoU）。

full.secZh: 3.2 基于人类反馈的强化学习

items.en: To align model outputs with human preferences and mitigate undesirable behaviors, we employ Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) as a complementary approach to our verifiable reward framework.
items.zh: 为了使模型输出与人类偏好对齐并减轻不良行为，我们采用基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）作为可验证奖励框架的补充方法。

items.en: Query diversity is paramount to the success of RLHF. Our methodology commences with gathering multimodal and text-only queries from open-source instruction tuning datasets and in-house human-written sources. All collected queries, both text and multimodal, then undergo a dedicated screening process. To further enhance diversity, we employ techniques such as clustering queries based on their embeddings and analyzing the resultant patterns. Crucially, we balance the proportions of Chinese and English queries, as well as those targeting helpfulness and harmlessness, before curating the final query set. For each selected query, MiMo-VL-7B and multiple other top-performing VLMs are prompted to generate responses. These responses are subsequently pairwise ranked by an advanced VLM to construct the definitive dataset for reward model training. Notably, to mitigate potential reward hacking, this same query set is utilized for both reward model training and the RLHF process.
items.zh: 查询多样性对于RLHF的成功至关重要。我们的方法首先从开源指令微调数据集和内部人工编写的来源收集多模态和纯文本查询。所有收集的查询（包括文本和多模态）随后经过专门的筛选过程。为了进一步增强多样性，我们采用了基于嵌入对查询进行聚类并分析结果模式等技术。关键的是，我们在策划最终查询集之前平衡了中文和英文查询的比例，以及针对有用性和无害性的查询比例。对于每个选定的查询，MiMo-VL-7B和其他多个顶级VLM被提示生成响应。这些响应随后由高级VLM进行成对排序，以构建用于奖励模型训练的最终数据集。值得注意的是，为了减轻潜在的奖励破解，相同的查询集同时用于奖励模型训练和RLHF过程。

items.en: We develop two specialized reward models tailored to different input modalities, training them using the Bradley-Terry reward modeling objective (Ouyang et al., 2022). The text-only reward model is initialized from MiMo-7B (Xiaomi, 2025) to leverage its strong language understanding capabilities, while the multimodal reward model builds upon MiMo-VL-7B to effectively process queries containing visual inputs. This dual-model approach ensures optimal performance across both textual and multimodal evaluation scenarios.
items.zh: 我们开发了两个专门针对不同输入模态的奖励模型，使用Bradley-Terry奖励建模目标进行训练（Ouyang et al., 2022）。纯文本奖励模型从MiMo-7B（Xiaomi, 2025）初始化，以利用其强大的语言理解能力，而多模态奖励模型基于MiMo-VL-7B构建，以有效处理包含视觉输入的查询。这种双模型方法确保了在文本和多模态评估场景中的最佳性能。

items.en: In the post-training phase of MiMo-VL-7B, we implement Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning (MORL) to simultaneously optimize RLVR and RLHF objectives. As illustrated in Figure 3, we integrate rule-based and model-based rewards as unified services within the verl framework (Sheng et al., 2024), enhanced by the Seamless Rollout Engine (Xiaomi, 2025).
items.zh: 在MiMo-VL-7B的后训练阶段，我们实现了混合在线策略强化学习（MORL），以同时优化RLVR和RLHF目标。如图3所示，我们将基于规则和基于模型的奖励作为统一服务集成到verl框架中（Sheng et al., 2024），并通过Seamless Rollout Engine（Xiaomi, 2025）增强。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Mixed On-policy Reinforcement Learning in post-training phase.
items.capZh: 图3：后训练阶段的混合在线策略强化学习。

items.en: We adopt a fully on-policy variant of GRPO (Shao et al., 2024) as the RL algorithm, which demonstrates robust training stability and effective exploration capabilities (Chen et al., 2025b). For each problem qq, the algorithm samples a group of responses {o1,o2,…,oG}\left\{o_{1},o_{2},...,o_{G}\right\} from the policy πθ\pi_{\theta}, and updates the policy by maximizing the following objective:

items.en: Compared to vanilla GRPO, this on-policy variant performs single-step policy updates following response rollout, eliminating the need for a clipped surrogate training objective. Following Xiaomi (2025), we integrate several advancements, including removal of the KL loss, dynamic sampling, easy data filter, and re-sampling strategies, into our RL training recipe.
items.zh: 与原始GRPO相比，此在线策略变体在响应推出后执行单步策略更新，无需裁剪的替代训练目标。遵循Xiaomi（2025），我们将多项改进集成到我们的RL训练方案中，包括移除KL损失、动态采样、简单数据过滤和重采样策略。

items.en: The MORL process integrates tasks across reasoning, perception, grounding, multimodal RLHF, and text-only RLHF, each requiring distinct reward functions or dedicated reward models. To provide a unified interface and near-zero latency reward computation, we introduce Reward-as-a-Service (RaaS). A reward router dynamically selects the appropriate reward function based on the query’s task type. To minimize latency, reward models are deployed as standalone services, ensuring scalable reward computation accessible via HTTP. All rewards are normalized to the range [0,1][0,1]. No additional reward, such as format rewards, is incorporated in our training process.
items.zh: MORL过程整合了推理、感知、定位、多模态RLHF和纯文本RLHF等任务，每个任务需要不同的奖励函数或专门的奖励模型。为了提供统一接口和接近零延迟的奖励计算，我们引入了奖励即服务（RaaS）。奖励路由器根据查询的任务类型动态选择适当的奖励函数。为了最小化延迟，奖励模型作为独立服务部署，确保可通过HTTP访问的可扩展奖励计算。所有奖励都归一化到[0,1][0,1]范围。我们的训练过程中没有引入额外的奖励，例如格式奖励。

items.en: We evaluate MiMo-VL-7B across 50 tasks to comprehensively assess its capabilities. Appendix C lists all the benchmarks adopted in our evaluation. We also assess model performance with an in-house evaluation set.
items.zh: 我们在50个任务上评估MiMo-VL-7B，以全面评估其能力。附录C列出了我们评估中采用的所有基准。我们还使用内部评估集评估模型性能。

items.en: For image understanding benchmarks, we set the max pixels for the input image to 4096 × 28 × 28 and the maximum generation tokens to 32,768, employing greedy search for decoding. For video benchmarks, videos are sampled at 2 FPS, with a maximum of 256 frames and a total token limit of 16,384. For text evaluation benchmarks, we set the max new tokens for generation as 32,768, temperature as 0.6 and top-p as 0.95. We adapt the existing framework based on LMMs-Eval (Zhang et al., 2024a) to better accommodate long-CoT reasoning models. We further optimize the evaluation logic for specific tasks to ensure better evaluation consistency. To facilitate open research, we open-source our evaluation framework with all prompts used.222https://github.com/XiaomiMiMo/lmms-eval
items.zh: 对于图像理解基准，我们将输入图像的最大像素设置为4096 × 28 × 28，最大生成token设置为32,768，采用贪婪搜索进行解码。对于视频基准，视频以2 FPS采样，最大帧数为256，总token限制为16,384。对于文本评估基准，我们将生成的最大新token设置为32,768，温度为0.6，top-p为0.95。我们基于LMMs-Eval（Zhang et al., 2024a）改编现有框架，以更好地适应长思维链推理模型。我们进一步优化了特定任务的评估逻辑，以确保更好的评估一致性。为了促进开放研究，我们开源了包含所有提示的评估框架。222https://github.com/XiaomiMiMo/lmms-eval

items.en: Specifically, our MiMo-VL-7B models achieve state-of-the-art results among open-source models. MiMo-VL-7B-SFT and (i) On general vision-language tasks, our models achieve exceptional performance that leads the open-source field. MiMo-VL-7B-SFT and MiMo-VL-7B-RL obtain 64.6% and 66.7% on MMMUval respectively, outperforming much larger models such as Gemma 3 27B. For document and chart understanding, MiMo-VL-7B-RL excels with a top open-source score of 56.5% on CharXivRQ, significantly exceeding Qwen2.5-VL (42.5%) by 14.0 points and InternVL3 (37.6%) by 18.9 points. (ii) Our models demonstrate superior video understanding capabilities while maintaining strong textual performance. MiMo-VL-SFT achieves a leading 53.1% on Video-MMMU, and MiMo-VL-RL obtains an impressive 50.0% mIoU on Charades-STA. (iii) Compared with MiMo-7B, our models maintain decent performance on text-only benchmarks. (iv) Remarkably, our MoRL yields comprehensive improvements, with the most impressive gains observed on challenging benchmarks such as VibeEval and CountBench.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们的MiMo-VL-7B模型在开源模型中取得了最先进的结果。MiMo-VL-7B-SFT和（i）在通用视觉语言任务上，我们的模型取得了领先开源领域的卓越性能。MiMo-VL-7B-SFT和MiMo-VL-7B-RL在MMMUval上分别获得64.6%和66.7%，优于更大的模型如Gemma 3 27B。在文档和图表理解方面，MiMo-VL-7B-RL在CharXivRQ上以56.5%的顶级开源分数表现出色，显著超过Qwen2.5-VL（42.5%）14.0个百分点和InternVL3（37.6%）18.9个百分点。（ii）我们的模型在保持强大文本性能的同时，展现出卓越的视频理解能力。MiMo-VL-SFT在Video-MMMU上达到领先的53.1%，MiMo-VL-RL在Charades-STA上获得令人印象深刻的50.0% mIoU。（iii）与MiMo-7B相比，我们的模型在纯文本基准上保持了不错的性能。（iv）值得注意的是，我们的MoRL带来了全面的改进，在VibeEval和CountBench等具有挑战性的基准上观察到了最显著的增益。

items.capEn: Figure 4: GUI understanding and grounding results. MiMo-VL-7B-RL achieves comparable results with GUI specialized models.
items.capZh: 图4：GUI理解和定位结果。MiMo-VL-7B-RL取得了与GUI专用模型相当的结果。

items.en: In addition, we demonstrate that MiMo-VL-7B models possess exceptional GUI understanding and grounding capabilities. In Table 2, MiMo-VL-7B-RL outperforms all other general VLMs compared. In Figure 4, we further compare MiMo-VL-7B-RL with GUI-specialized models (UI-TARS-1.0 (Qin et al., 2025a), Aguvis (Xu et al., 2024), OS-Atlas (Wu et al., 2024)) of similar size on GUI Understanding (WebSrc, VisualWebBench) and Grounding (Screenspot, Screenspot-v2, Screenspot-Pro, OSWorld-G) benchmarks. As a general-purpose VLM, MiMo-VL achieves comparable or even superior performance to GUI-specialized models, particularly on the more challenging Screenspot-Pro and OSWorld-G benchmarks.
items.zh: 此外，我们证明了MiMo-VL-7B模型具有卓越的GUI理解和定位能力。在表2中，MiMo-VL-7B-RL优于所有其他比较的通用VLM。在图4中，我们进一步将MiMo-VL-7B-RL与类似规模的GUI专用模型（UI-TARS-1.0（Qin et al., 2025a）、Aguvis（Xu et al., 2024）、OS-Atlas（Wu et al., 2024））在GUI理解（WebSrc、VisualWebBench）和定位（Screenspot、Screenspot-v2、Screenspot-Pro、OSWorld-G）基准上进行比较。作为通用VLM，MiMo-VL取得了与GUI专用模型相当甚至更优的性能，特别是在更具挑战性的Screenspot-Pro和OSWorld-G基准上。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Elo ratings comparison across VLMs. MiMo-VL-7B-RL achieves the highest rating among open-source models, approaching the performance of proprietary alternatives such as Claude 3.7 Sonnet.
items.capZh: 图5：各VLM的Elo评分比较。MiMo-VL-7B-RL在开源模型中取得最高评分，接近Claude 3.7 Sonnet等专有替代品的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 6: MiMo-VL-7B-SFT training curves in Stage 4.
Figure 7: On-policy RL and vanilla GRPO shows contrasting scaling behavior: on-policy RL performance continuously improves with more data, while vanilla GRPO reaches a plateau around 20,000 samples.
items.capZh: 图7：在线策略RL和原始GRPO表现出不同的缩放行为：在线策略RL的性能随着数据增加持续提升，而原始GRPO在大约20,000个样本时达到平台期。

items.en: Inspired by ChatbotArena (Zheng et al., 2023), we construct a balanced bilingual (Chinese and English) in-house evaluation dataset comprising real user prompts. This approach assesses user preference beyond traditional benchmark scores, providing insights into practical model performance in real-world scenarios.
items.zh: 受ChatbotArena（Zheng et al., 2023）启发，我们构建了一个平衡的双语（中文和英文）内部评估数据集，包含真实用户提示。这种方法评估了传统基准分数之外的用户偏好，提供了对模型在真实场景中实际性能的洞察。

items.en: Following the methodology of (Chou et al., 2024), we conduct pairwise comparisons between MiMo-VL-7B and competing models, including leading proprietary models and open-source VLMs ranging from 7B to 72B parameters. We compute Elo ratings based on GPT-4o judgments with style-controlled evaluation protocols. Our evaluation covers a diverse range of visual-linguistic tasks, including multimodal reasoning, image understanding, and GUI interaction scenarios, therefore serving as a good proxy of user preference.
items.zh: 遵循(Chou et al., 2024)的方法，我们在MiMo-VL-7B与竞争模型之间进行成对比较，包括领先的专有模型和参数规模从7B到72B的开源VLM。我们基于GPT-4o的判断，采用风格控制的评估协议计算Elo评分。我们的评估涵盖了多样化的视觉-语言任务，包括多模态推理、图像理解和GUI交互场景，因此可作为用户偏好的良好代理。

items.en: As illustrated in Figure 5, MiMo-VL-7B-RL achieves the highest Elo rating among all evaluated open-source VLMs, ranking first across models spanning from 7B to 72B parameters. This demonstrates superior user experience across the evaluation set, with our model’s performance closely approaching that of proprietary models such as Claude 3.7 Sonnet. Moreover, MORL brings a boost of 22+ points for the MiMo-VL-7B-SFT. These results highlight the competitive capability of our models and validate the effectiveness of our training methodology.
items.zh: 如图5所示，MiMo-VL-7B-RL在所有评估的开源VLM中取得了最高的Elo评分，在7B到72B参数规模的模型中排名第一。这表明我们的模型在评估集上提供了卓越的用户体验，其性能接近Claude 3.7 Sonnet等专有模型。此外，MORL为MiMo-VL-7B-SFT带来了22分以上的提升。这些结果凸显了我们模型的竞争能力，并验证了训练方法的有效性。

items.en: We explore the benefits of on-policy RL v.s. vanilla GRPO with text-only reasoning tasks. As illustrated in Figure 7, the on-policy algorithm demonstrates a consistent positive correlation between training data volume and performance score. Its learning curve shows no signs of saturation within the observed training window, suggesting potential for further enhancement with additional computational resources and data. Conversely, the vanilla GRPO algorithm initially exhibits higher sample efficiency, achieving robust performance early in training. This advantage, however, is transient. The algorithm’s performance generally saturates around 20,000 training samples, beyond which further training yields negligible improvements.
items.zh: 我们探讨了在仅文本推理任务上，在线策略RL与原始GRPO相比的优势。如图7所示，在线策略算法在训练数据量与性能得分之间表现出一致的正相关。其学习曲线在观察的训练窗口内没有出现饱和迹象，表明通过额外的算力和数据有进一步提升的潜力。相反，原始GRPO算法在初期表现出更高的样本效率，在训练早期就实现了稳健的性能。然而，这一优势是短暂的。该算法的性能通常在约20,000个训练样本时达到饱和，此后进一步训练带来的改进微乎其微。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Examples of MiMo-VL-7B solving complicated problems.
items.capZh: 图8：MiMo-VL-7B解决复杂问题的示例。

items.en: While MORL training enhances performance on nearly all evaluated tasks, achieving stable and simultaneous improvements across diverse task domains remains a significant challenge. During training, we observe that reasoning tasks exhibit disparities with visual perception and grounding tasks, such as visual grounding and counting, making it difficult to match the performance of standalone RL on individual tasks.
items.zh: 尽管MORL训练在几乎所有评估任务上提升了性能，但在不同任务领域实现稳定且同步的改进仍然是一个重大挑战。在训练过程中，我们观察到推理任务与视觉感知和定位任务（如视觉定位和计数）之间存在差异，使得难以匹配单独RL在单个任务上的性能。

items.en: The potential cause lies in the opposing growth trends of response length: reasoning tasks encourage longer CoT during the RL process, whereas grounding and counting tasks lead to shrinking ones. Disparities in task difficulty and the risk of reward hacking may also contribute to this interference. We are actively investigating the underlying causes of this phenomenon and seeking solutions to achieve consistent and persistent growth across all tasks.
items.zh: 潜在原因在于响应长度的相反增长趋势：推理任务在RL过程中鼓励更长的思维链，而定位和计数任务则导致响应长度缩短。任务难度的差异以及奖励黑客攻击的风险也可能导致这种干扰。我们正在积极研究这一现象的根本原因，并寻求在所有任务上实现一致且持续增长的解决方案。

items.capEn: Figure 9: A case demonstrating the agentic capabilities of our model. MiMo-VL-7B successfully navigates a website to add the Xiaomi SU7 to the wishlist, customizing both paint and interior options. All screenshots are of size 1886*1544 (width*height).
items.capZh: 图9：展示我们模型智能体能力的案例。MiMo-VL-7B成功导航网站，将小米SU7添加到心愿单，并定制了颜色和内饰选项。所有截图尺寸为1886*1544（宽*高）。

items.en: We present qualitative results in Figure 8 and Appendix E. As depicted in the top example in Figure 8, our model showcases strong plot understanding capabilities, successfully converting an intricate plot into a well-structured markdown table. Additionally, we highlight the models’ superior reasoning capabilities in STEM tasks. In the examples shown in Figure 10 and Figure 13, the model effectively addresses multiple STEM questions within a single response. Furthermore, our model exhibits strong agentic capabilities. As illustrated in Figure 9, MiMo-VL-7B successfully navigates a website to add the Xiaomi SU7 to the wishlist, with customized paint and interior options.
items.zh: 我们在图8和附录E中展示了定性结果。如图8顶部示例所示，我们的模型展示了强大的情节理解能力，成功将复杂情节转换为结构良好的markdown表格。此外，我们强调了模型在STEM任务中的卓越推理能力。在图10和图13所示的示例中，模型在单个响应中有效回答了多个STEM问题。此外，我们的模型表现出强大的智能体能力。如图9所示，MiMo-VL-7B成功导航网站，将小米SU7添加到心愿单，并定制了颜色和内饰选项。

items.en: In this report, we present our efforts in building MiMo-VL-7B models. Leveraging curated high-quality pre-training datasets and our MORL framework, MiMo-VL-7B-SFT and MiMo-VL-7B-RL demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across evaluated benchmarks. We share key observations from our development process: the consistent performance gains from incorporating reasoning data in later pre-training stages, the advantages of on-policy RL over vanilla GRPO, and the challenges of task interference when applying MORL across diverse capabilities. Alongside the released model checkpoints, we open-source our comprehensive evaluation suite to promote transparency and reproducibility in multimodal research. We hope our work advances the development of capable open-source vision-language models and provides valuable insights for the community.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了构建MiMo-VL-7B模型的工作。利用精心策划的高质量预训练数据集和我们的MORL框架，MiMo-VL-7B-SFT和MiMo-VL-7B-RL在评估基准上展示了最先进的性能。我们分享了开发过程中的关键观察：在后期预训练阶段加入推理数据带来的持续性能提升，在线策略RL相对于原始GRPO的优势，以及在跨多种能力应用MORL时任务干扰的挑战。除了发布的模型检查点，我们还开源了全面的评估套件，以促进多模态研究的透明度和可重复性。我们希望我们的工作能够推动有能力的开源视觉-语言模型的发展，并为社区提供有价值的见解。
